prompt: Create a minimal HTTP router system with three files: router.js (Router class with get/post/put/delete methods that register routes, supports :param path parameters, and a handle(method, url) method that returns the matching handler and extracted params), middleware.js (a compose function that takes middleware functions and returns a single handler), and server.js (ties them together with a createApp() function). Routes should match patterns like '/users/:id'.
description: Build HTTP router with param extraction and middleware
